result:
Filled all 24 decisions at `/workspace/nexus-mk2/.scratch/patron-anima-eval/agent-output/anima-session-generic-engine.yaml`.

**Summary of the shape of the decisions:**

- **Naming (D1–D4)** — picked kebab-case `anima-session` throughout as engine id, file, and dict key; existing `<name>Engine` suffix for the export. First multi-word engine, so these set precedent (#13).
- **Fail-loud discipline (D5, D6, D19, D22)** — throw on missing required givens, throw when cwd can't resolve, throw when a declared $yields upstream is missing, validate engineId+transitivity at spawn time.
- **Skip-when-unset (D7, D8, D12, D14)** — omit `environment`/`writId`/`conversationId` rather than passing explicit-undefined; no speculative mock variants.
- **No speculative structure (D9, D18, D21)** — no AnimaSessionYields type, single-level path traversal, incremental regex extension — all deferred until a second consumer earns them (#18).
- **$yields.* resolution (D15–D17, D20, D23, D24)** — mirrors existing `$writ`/`${writ}` semantics (whole-value + embedded), resolved at run time via a named helper, applies universally across engines (generic layer stays generic, #6).
- **Contract hygiene (D11, D13)** — reuse `DraftYields` type; update `ReviseYields` to match reality rather than letting the type lie.

No decisions triggered `custom`; no decisions hit `no_principle_fired`. Highest-confidence calls: D3, D4, D5, D6, D9, D16, D24.
